name: claude-d3js
description: d3-viz: a d3.js playbook for building custom, interactive data visualisations (force-directed network graphs, hierarchies, geographic projections, choreographed transitions, publication-quality SVG) beyond standard chart libraries. By Chris von Csefalvay.
